description: Product Description Learning Resources Kanoodle basic. Players improve their spatial reasoning and critical thinking skills as they rearrange the colourful pieces to solve 2D and 3D puzzles. Featuring 200 brain boosting challenges, players simply pick a challenge from the book, set it up, then place their remaining plastic game pieces correctly in order to complete the challenge. Includes 12 colourful puzzle pieces, 48-page challenge booklet (including 200 puzzles) and sturdy carry case. Challenges progress in difficulty. Perfect for individual play. Suitable for ages 7+. Safety Warning Choking hazard - small parts. Box Contains 1 x Kanoodle Toy See more
